texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are per person per night with a two adult minimum occupancy in Cliff and Beach Villa, and four adults in Garden Villa for exclusive use of each villa. For families, teenager and children rates will apply.
texts.text: Rates are per person per night with a two adult minimum occupancy in Cliff and Beach Villa, and four adults in Garden Villa for exclusive use of each villa. For families, teenager and children rates will apply.

texts.orig: 13 - 19 years at $ 500 per night in own room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In Cliff Villa up to nine guests can be accommodated in four spacious bedrooms, each having their own large bathroom. All rooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets (three double rooms and one twin). As size and interior decor in the rooms differ, Cliff Villa is not suitable for four couples; it is the ideal solution for large families or the ultimate romantic getaway. On the top floor is the Turret Suite, which has been rated as the most romantic room on the East African coast. On the first floor there are two double rooms with a shared private veranda, and on the ground floor a twin room. An extra bed can be added in the double room on the first floor.
texts.text: In Cliff Villa up to nine guests can be accommodated in four spacious bedrooms, each having their own large bathroom. All rooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets (three double rooms and one twin). As size and interior decor in the rooms differ, Cliff Villa is not suitable for four couples; it is the ideal solution for large families or the ultimate romantic getaway. On the top floor is the Turret Suite, which has been rated as the most romantic room on the East African coast. On the first floor there are two double rooms with a shared private veranda, and on the ground floor a twin room. An extra bed can be added in the double room on the first floor.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In Garden Villa up to ten guests can be accommodated in four large luxuriously appointed bedrooms, each with their own large bathroom, and all overlooking the Indian Ocean. All rooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets (three double rooms and one twin). An extra bed can be added in the twin room and also in the double room on the first floor. All rooms have different interior decoration, but are the same size, so Garden Villa is ideal for three couples travelling together or a large family.
texts.text: In Garden Villa up to ten guests can be accommodated in four large luxuriously appointed bedrooms, each with their own large bathroom, and all overlooking the Indian Ocean. All rooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets (three double rooms and one twin). An extra bed can be added in the twin room and also in the double room on the first floor. All rooms have different interior decoration, but are the same size, so Garden Villa is ideal for three couples travelling together or a large family.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In Beach Villa up to six guests can be accommodated in two double bedrooms on the ground floor and one twin on the first floor. All bedrooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets and have their own en suite bathroom. This villa is deal for friends travelling together, families with children, or a couple that wants complete privacy.
texts.text: In Beach Villa up to six guests can be accommodated in two double bedrooms on the ground floor and one twin on the first floor. All bedrooms are air conditioned with mosquito nets and have their own en suite bathroom. This villa is deal for friends travelling together, families with children, or a couple that wants complete privacy.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates are applicable from 7th January 2025 up to 6th January 2026.
texts.text: Rates are applicable from 7th January 2025 up to 6th January 2026.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates are in USD inclusive of all taxes.
texts.text: Rates are in USD inclusive of all taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Clients leaving Alfajiri after lunch, no later than 15h00 will have their villa on exclusive use with all services included at 30% of the daily rate.
texts.text: Clients leaving Alfajiri after lunch, no later than 15h00 will have their villa on exclusive use with all services included at 30% of the daily rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Clients leaving Alfajiri after 15h00 will have their villa on exclusive use and all services included at 100% of the daily rate.
texts.text: Clients leaving Alfajiri after 15h00 will have their villa on exclusive use and all services included at 100% of the daily rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Located only a 5 minute drive from Ukunda airstrip in Diani.
texts.text: Located only a 5 minute drive from Ukunda airstrip in Diani.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Transfer from Mombasa airport $ 200 by Alfajiri SUV vehicles, maximum 4 passengers.
texts.text: Transfer from Mombasa airport $ 200 by Alfajiri SUV vehicles, maximum 4 passengers.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Garden and Cliff Villa will be rented based on a minimum occupancy of 6 adults.
texts.text: Garden and Cliff Villa will be rented based on a minimum occupancy of 6 adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Beach Villa will be rented based on a minimum occupancy of 4 adults.
texts.text: Beach Villa will be rented based on a minimum occupancy of 4 adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Minimum 7 night stay from 22nd December to 6th January, inclusive.
texts.text: Minimum 7 night stay from 22nd December to 6th January, inclusive.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Exclusive use of the villa and pool
texts.text: Exclusive use of the villa and pool

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Soft drinks, beer, wines and spirits
texts.text: Soft drinks, beer, wines and spirits

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Ngalawa (local African boats) at disposal for excursions to coral reef for snorkeling
texts.text: Ngalawa (local African boats) at disposal for excursions to coral reef for snorkeling

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Chauffeured transport within Diani Beach area
texts.text: Chauffeured transport within Diani Beach area

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Dhow excursion to Kisite Marine National Park
texts.text: Dhow excursion to Kisite Marine National Park

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Golf at the nearby 18 hole Golf Course
texts.text: Golf at the nearby 18 hole Golf Course

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Day safaris to Shimba Hills National Park
texts.text: Day safaris to Shimba Hills National Park

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each guest will contribute a donation of $10 per adult and per teenager per night and $5 per child per night to the Alfajiri Foundation.
texts.text: Each guest will contribute a donation of $10 per adult and per teenager per night and $5 per child per night to the Alfajiri Foundation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All donations will support marine conservation organisations and local orphanages.
texts.text: All donations will support marine conservation organisations and local orphanages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A 25% non-refundable deposit of the cost of accommodation is required to hold and confirm bookings.
texts.text: A 25% non-refundable deposit of the cost of accommodation is required to hold and confirm bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The remaining balance is due 60 days prior to the arrival date.
texts.text: The remaining balance is due 60 days prior to the arrival date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellation should be in writing and will result in the loss of the deposit.
texts.text: Cancellation should be in writing and will result in the loss of the deposit.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If cancellation occurs within 60-31days before arrival, 50% of the cost of accommodation will be charged.
texts.text: If cancellation occurs within 60-31days before arrival, 50% of the cost of accommodation will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If cancellation occurs within 30 days of the arrival date, 100% of the cost of accommodation will be charged.
texts.text: If cancellation occurs within 30 days of the arrival date, 100% of the cost of accommodation will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Guests should have a travel insurance policy covering deposit paid to confirm reservation.
texts.text: Guests should have a travel insurance policy covering deposit paid to confirm reservation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Clients must take out comprehensive insurance cover before travel for cancellation, medical expense, personal baggage and money.
texts.text: Clients must take out comprehensive insurance cover before travel for cancellation, medical expense, personal baggage and money.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of increase in any tax, training levy, or service charge, Alfajiri Villas, reserve the right to adjust all contract rates accordingly from the date of such change. Alfajiri Villas may at its discretion, but not less than one months notice in writing to the Operator, alter the contract.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Magiufa Ltd. Trading as Alfajiri Villas and its owners, directors, management and employees shall not assume liability for any illness, injury or death to persons visiting the property nor for any other incident of any nature involving any client(s) while they are on the property nor while travelling to or from the property. Magiufa Ltd. Trading as Alfajiri Villas cannot be held responsible for loss or damage.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All concerns must be brought to the attention of the management prior to the client's departure in order to finalize the issues on the ground at the time. Should this not be possible then they are to be followed up in writing no later than 14 days after departure where the Kenyan legal system will be adhered to exclusively.
